result.text:
Encounter seed.

Environment:
Independent pirate havens and trade ports governed by the Free Accords. Cosmopolitan docks where contracts matter more than morality and alliances shift with the tides.

What the party first notices:
a ship is unloading at night under the protection of too many hired blades.

Who or what is involved:
an armed contract scribe.

What is actually happening:
somebody is using the Free Accords to justify murder.

Complication:
if the cargo leaves the city, the problem becomes much larger.

GM Hook:
interpret or steal a contract before blood settles the issue.

STYLE:
painted british comic encounter illustration, gritty graphic novel action scene, heavy ink outlines, thick painterly brush strokes, high contrast saturated colors, dramatic composition, immediate tension, layered action, dark fantasy encounter art.
